title: Medication Refill
scenario: Alice delegates medication refill management to her personal agent. The agent may monitor refill status, communicate with the pharmacy, and arrange delivery.
objective: Ensure medication is refilled and delivered before the existing supply is exhausted.
preferences: Avoid unnecessary interruptions to the subject.
hard_constraints: Never refill medications that require additional authorization.
fallback_behaviors: Continue only within previously authorized bounds.
notes: The same mission should produce identical governance decisions regardless of whether execution is projected through AAuth, UCAN, ZCAP, or future protocols.
